name: Unilateral Salpingo-Oophorectomy
description: Removal of one ovary and ipsilateral tube.

name: Bilateral Salpingo-Oophorectomy
description: Removal of both ovaries and both tubes.

name: Unilateral Salpingectomy
description: Removal of one fallopian tube.

name: Bilateral Salpingectomy
description: Removal of both fallopian tubes.

name: Unilateral Oophorectomy
description: Removal of a single ovary.

name: Bilateral Oophorectomy
description: Removal of both ovaries.

name: Benign Simple Cystectomy
description: Ovary-preserving cystectomy for simple benign-appearing ovarian cyst.

name: Endometrioma / Complex Cystectomy
description: Ovary-preserving excision for endometrioma or complex benign cyst.

name: Office Hysteroscopy
description: Diagnostic hysteroscopy performed in ambulatory clinic setting without general anaesthesia.

name: Day-Case Hysteroscopy Under Anaesthesia
description: Diagnostic hysteroscopy performed in theatre/day-surgery setting with anaesthetic support.

name: Diagnostic Curettage
description: Cervical dilatation and curettage performed primarily for endometrial sampling and diagnosis.

name: Therapeutic Curettage
description: Curettage undertaken to evacuate or reduce abnormal intrauterine contents/bleeding burden.

name: Resectoscopic Ablation
description: First-generation hysteroscopic endometrial ablation using resectoscopic technique.

name: Second-Generation Global Ablation
description: Global endometrial ablation using balloon, radiofrequency, or other second-generation device.

name: Small Solitary Polyp Resection
description: Operative hysteroscopy for focal small endometrial polyp amenable to straightforward removal.

name: Multiple or Broad-Based Polyp Resection
description: Operative hysteroscopy for multiple lesions or broad-based polyp requiring more extensive cavity work.

name: Type 0-1 Submucous Fibroid Resection
description: Hysteroscopic myomectomy for intracavitary or predominantly intracavitary fibroid.

name: Type 2 / Staged Fibroid Resection
description: Complex hysteroscopic myomectomy for deeper intramural extension or planned staged resection.

name: Standard LAVH
description: Laparoscopic-assisted vaginal hysterectomy without major additional adnexal extirpation.

name: LAVH with Bilateral Salpingectomy
description: LAVH including bilateral salpingectomy.

name: Open Abdominal Myomectomy
description: Open uterine-sparing myomectomy for larger or numerous fibroids.

name: Complex Multiple Fibroid Myomectomy
description: Myomectomy involving multiple fibroids, cavity entry, or reconstructive multilayer closure.

name: TAH with Ovarian Conservation
description: Abdominal hysterectomy with preservation of ovaries and no major adnexal extirpation.

name: TAH with Bilateral Salpingectomy
description: Abdominal hysterectomy with opportunistic bilateral salpingectomy.

name: TAH with Adnexal Surgery
description: Abdominal hysterectomy combined with unilateral or bilateral adnexal procedure.

name: Standard TLH
description: Routine total laparoscopic hysterectomy for benign pathology.

name: TLH with Bilateral Salpingectomy
description: Laparoscopic hysterectomy including bilateral salpingectomy.

name: TLH with Adnexal Surgery
description: TLH combined with unilateral/bilateral adnexal surgery.

name: Standard Vaginal Hysterectomy
description: Routine vaginal hysterectomy for benign uterine pathology.

name: Vaginal Hysterectomy with Native Tissue Repair
description: Vaginal hysterectomy combined with anterior/posterior native tissue prolapse repair.

name: Local Excision of Benign Vulval Lesion
description: Excision of benign vulval lesion with limited margins.

name: Wide Local Excision of Suspicious Vulval Lesion
description: Wider-margin excision of suspicious or premalignant vulval lesion.

name: Bartholin Cyst Marsupialisation
description: Marsupialisation for recurrent symptomatic Bartholin cyst without acute sepsis.

name: Bartholin Abscess Marsupialisation
description: Marsupialisation/drainage pathway for Bartholin abscess requiring operative management.

name: TAH-BSO with Standard Surgical Staging
description: TAH-BSO with routine staging steps for presumed uterine/adnexal malignancy.

name: TAH-BSO with Additional Oncologic Procedures
description: TAH-BSO combined with nodal dissection, omentectomy, or further staging/debulking elements.

name: Cold Knife Cone Biopsy
description: Cold knife conization for diagnostic or therapeutic excision of cervical disease.

name: Laser Cone Excision
description: Laser-assisted cone excision where appropriate local practice/equipment is used.

name: Primary Cytoreductive Surgery
description: Upfront debulking surgery performed before systemic chemotherapy.

name: Interval Cytoreductive Surgery
description: Debulking surgery undertaken after neoadjuvant chemotherapy.

name: Extended Cytoreduction with Upper Abdominal Procedures
description: Cytoreductive surgery requiring multiquadrant or upper abdominal disease clearance.

name: Unilateral Oophorectomy with Oncologic Staging
description: Fertility-sparing or side-specific oophorectomy combined with surgical staging.

name: Bilateral Oophorectomy / Completion Adnexal Extirpation
description: Bilateral ovarian removal or completion adnexal extirpation for malignancy management.

name: Pelvic Node Dissection for Staging
description: Systematic pelvic lymphadenectomy primarily for staging information.

name: Bilateral Pelvic Node Dissection for Therapeutic Clearance
description: More extensive bilateral pelvic lymphadenectomy for disease clearance and staging.

name: Infracolic Omentectomy
description: Standard infracolic omentectomy for staging or cytoreductive surgery.

name: Extended / Near-Total Omentectomy
description: More extensive omental resection for bulky or widespread upper abdominal disease.

name: Type B Radical Hysterectomy
description: Modified radical hysterectomy with parametrial resection appropriate to tumour extent.

name: Type C Radical Hysterectomy
description: More extensive radical hysterectomy with wider parametrial and paracolpial resection.

name: Unilateral Laparoscopic Salpingectomy
description: Laparoscopic removal of one fallopian tube.

name: Bilateral Laparoscopic Salpingectomy
description: Laparoscopic removal of both fallopian tubes.

name: Simple Benign Cystectomy
description: Laparoscopic cystectomy for simple benign ovarian cyst.

name: Endometrioma Cystectomy
description: Laparoscopic cystectomy for ovarian endometrioma.

name: Diagnostic Inspection Only
description: Pelvic diagnostic laparoscopy without planned operative intervention.

name: Diagnostic Laparoscopy with Biopsy
description: Diagnostic laparoscopy combined with peritoneal/ovarian/pelvic biopsy.

name: Superficial Endometriosis Excision/Ablation
description: Treatment of superficial peritoneal endometriosis.

name: Deep Infiltrating Endometriosis Surgery
description: Complex laparoscopic excision for deep infiltrating endometriosis.

name: Total Laparoscopic Hysterectomy
description: Laparoscopic removal of uterus and cervix.

name: Laparoscopic Supracervical Hysterectomy
description: Laparoscopic removal of uterine corpus with retention of cervix.

name: Single Dominant Fibroid Myomectomy
description: Laparoscopic excision of a single dominant fibroid.

name: Multiple Fibroid Laparoscopic Myomectomy
description: Laparoscopic myomectomy involving multiple fibroids and uterine reconstruction.

name: Chromopertubation Assessment
description: Diagnostic laparoscopy with dye insufflation to assess tubal patency.

name: Tubal Patency Test with Minor Operative Adjuncts
description: Patency assessment combined with minor adhesiolysis or limited endometriosis treatment.

name: Limited Salpingolysis
description: Release of limited peritubal adhesions.

name: Extensive Bilateral Salpingolysis
description: More extensive bilateral peritubal adhesiolysis to restore tubo-ovarian anatomy.

name: Unilateral Salpingostomy
description: Creation of distal tubal opening on one side.

name: Bilateral Salpingostomy / Fimbrioplasty
description: Bilateral distal tubal reconstructive surgery or fimbrioplasty.

name: Unilateral Ovarian Drilling
description: Drilling undertaken on a single ovary where clinically selected.

name: Bilateral Ovarian Drilling
description: Standard bilateral laparoscopic ovarian drilling for selected anovulation cases.

name: Limited Reproductive Adhesiolysis
description: Limited adhesiolysis to improve fertility-related pelvic anatomy.

name: Extensive Fertility-Preserving Adhesiolysis
description: Extensive pelvic adhesiolysis requiring careful reproductive organ preservation.

name: Laparoscopic Sacrocolpopexy
description: Minimally invasive laparoscopic sacrocolpopexy.

name: Robotic Sacrocolpopexy
description: Robot-assisted sacrocolpopexy for apical prolapse repair.

name: Open Abdominal Sacrocolpopexy
description: Open abdominal sacrocolpopexy where minimally invasive approach is unsuitable.

name: Vaginal Uterosacral Suspension
description: Vaginal native tissue apical suspension using uterosacral ligaments.

name: Laparoscopic Uterosacral Suspension
description: Laparoscopic apical suspension using uterosacral ligaments.

name: Retropubic Midurethral Sling
description: Retropubic synthetic midurethral sling pathway.

name: Transobturator Midurethral Sling
description: Transobturator midurethral sling pathway.

name: Primary Urethral Bulking Injection
description: Initial bulking injection course for stress urinary incontinence.

name: Repeat / Top-Up Bulking Injection
description: Repeat bulking injection after waning response or partial symptom control.

name: Vaginal Hysterectomy with Native Tissue Prolapse Repair
description: Prolapse hysterectomy combined with anterior/posterior native tissue compartment repair.

name: Vaginal Hysterectomy with Apical Suspension
description: Prolapse hysterectomy combined with uterosacral or sacrospinous apical support.

name: Primary Native Tissue Anterior Repair
description: Initial native tissue cystocele repair with fascial plication.

name: Recurrent / Complex Anterior Repair
description: Anterior repair for recurrent prolapse or attenuated tissue requiring more extensive reconstruction.

name: Primary Native Tissue Posterior Repair
description: Initial posterior vaginal wall repair for rectocele.

name: Posterior Repair with Perineorrhaphy
description: Posterior repair combined with perineal body reconstruction.
